name: Radar Array
notes: Signal Ridge only, and pre-seeded/fixed (isFixed: true, same pattern as HQ/Ice Spire): never freshly built even after capture, so there is exactly one Radar Array per map — it can only be rebuilt from a ruin (normal rebuildCost applies) if destroyed. That cap matters because its bonus is unlike Tower's short-range detector (data/buildings/tower.json): the first building whose effect isn't local to its own base at all. Alongside the usual local detection radius (visionRange in nonProductionUpgrade.baseStats, paired with the top-level detector: true flag — detectionRange is omitted, so it detects stealth at that same full visionRange, no short-range restriction like Tower), it also grants globalVisionRangeBonus, a flat vision-range bonus applied map-wide to the owning player rather than to this base alone. Being fixed keeps that map-wide bonus from being stackable by building several. No production/defensive stats — passive, no queue or targeting, so its detector flag is only ever useful because revealing a stealthed unit exposes it to whatever else of the owning player's is nearby (troops, Turret, etc.) — Radar Array itself never lands a hit.
